units.name: Wraith
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Longshot
units.prompt: Maintain distance. Use precision_shot on high-value targets — medics first, then damage dealers. Use suppressing_fire if enemies close in.

units.name: Weaver
units.prompt: Trap the paths enemies must take to reach your backline. Stay at medium range. Use pulse on clustered enemies. Denial blocks adjacent threats.

units.name: Phantom
units.prompt: Stay cloaked and flank. Prioritize assassinating the enemy damage dealer. Use breach on sentinels to break their defensive posture. Recloak whenever it drops.

units.name: Patch
units.prompt: Stay adjacent to the most threatened ally. Use patch on the most wounded teammate. If all healthy, use overclock on your damage dealer.

units.name: Lattice
units.prompt: Control chokepoints with traps. Place them between enemy positions and your allies. Use denial to block adjacent enemy abilities. Pulse groups when possible.

actions.thinking: All allies are at full HP. Orders say to use overclock on damage dealer if all healthy. Phantom (specter) is the damage dealer at (0,5), distance 2 from me. I need to move adjacent to Phantom first, then overclock them. Moving to (1,5) puts me adjacent to Phantom at (0,5).

Round 1, overclocked (2 ability uses). All enemies are far away. Priority target is Longshot (striker = damage dealer). Start with cloak per tip, then advance toward center to close distance. Move toward (0,2) to advance down the left flank while staying cloaked.
Round 1, time to cloak per orders and tip. Cloak first, then advance toward the enemy medic (Patch) who is the priority target. Move north to close distance while cloaked.

Both enemies are out of range (dist 6-7, my range is 2). I need to advance toward Patch (medic, high priority). Moving to (2,2) gets me closer while staying safe. No ability target in range, so I'll wait on the second action.
